content:
Hi there!

Thank you so much for translating these! I haven't found the translation file on Github yet, so it wasn't uploaded this time; if you could submit a merge request again, I'll be able to upload the translation along with next version's batch!

Yes, its compiled but haven't pushed to GitHub yet. xD
I'll request a merge after finishing the current WoD because it's also almost done. <:aurita_beg2:1407642015428116541>

Dear @everyone,

Thank you so much from the bottom of our hearts for your help!

We have compiled the translation contributions we've received so far; the translations will be updated in-game **by September 17.** 
The list of Volunteers in our in-game Special Thanks page will also be updated according to this list.

Please confirm if we have logged your name (The name you want us to credit you by) and contribution content correctly! 
If there is any mistake, please let me know **by September 12.**

**Contributors by Language**

**English (EN)**
**ghostboots**
  - Proofread "Salvador Special Ops"
  - Proofread "Salvador Awakener Story"
  - Proofread "Awakener Story"
**Dredge**
  - Proofread Horla's skill descriptions and miscellaneous errors
 - Proofread and edited text messages to be more natural to American English.
**Arkaether**
  - Finished Chapter 5 editing + minor error fixing
  - Fully edited Chapter 4 (name/item changes for consistency)
  - Edited all main story chapter title cards, stage names, and flavor text
  - Edited Act 1 and Act 2 chapter title cards
**SophieChoice**
  - Worked on the "EN Prologue"
**Goz**
  - General proofreading for typos & minor rewordings for uniformization (gameplay text)
**omnichromia**
  - Proofread Map Tile Event Dialog options + Symptom Cards

**German (DE)**
**Strandiel, Larvani**
  - Proofread text for: Dissolution Ruins, Verboten Covenant, Lightless Realm, Phantasmal Dive, Skill Descriptions
 - Translated key terms
**Korean (KR)**
**Nero, LavenderJuly**
 - Proofread major ui and gameplay elements consistency  (characters, skills, items, keywords, etc)

**Portuguese (PT)**
**MarcosWG**
  - Translated "Major Characters Codename" into Portuguese (PT)

**Indonesian (ID)**
**Adelle, Rosemary, and Yunita**
  - Translated key terms

(continued)

**Thai (TH)**
**darkerkuro**
  - Translated key terms

**French (FR)**
**Noah, Goz, Basile, Loki Locstar, nauravale, Jun**
  - Translated key terms

**Spanish (ES)**
**Miguel Ángel**
  - Translated key terms

**Russian (RU)**
**TheRiddleOfCards**
**Kainoxis, Solgazm, SuverNai, Bervernis, Elandriah**
  - Translated key terms

**Japanese (JP)**
**Alza**
  - Proofread Prologue

Also, about Key Terms translations...

Now a lot of key terms have been translated into languages other than English!!

Those languages used to be entirely machine translated. Thank you so much!

We will machine translate all entries of those languages again, but this time with the newly updated terms, so the terms will be more consistent.

Later, when volunteers contribute their translations, we'll upload and replace the machine translation as usual.

This process will take a couple weeks, though. **The new key terms translation you contributed will not immediately take effect in game yet.**

Korean(KR)
Nero, LavenderJuly
Proofread major ui and gameplay elements consistency  (characters, skills, items, keywords, etc)
i was the only one who uploaded but we worked together!

Adelle, Alza-asn, Arkaether, Bervernis, darkerkuro, Dredge, ghostboots, Goz, Kainoxis, Larvani, LavenderJuly, 拉娅妮丝, MarcosWG, Mercy, Miguel Ángel, Nero, Noah, omnichromia, Rosemary, Serhii Pidhorodetskyi, Solgazm, SophieChoice, Strandiel, SuverNai, TheRiddleOfCards, Yunita

Here's the list of names from A-Z;

Let me know if we listed your name correctly!

https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1cKOGnLESM3WajWbTVEWdacvpuBfENQw1iQ9ep-ih9Mc/edit?gid=921939550#gid=921939550 We used this file to translate the important terms, does it need to be uploaded on github?

Japanese (JA)
Alza
Proofread Prologe

Please list my name as “Alza”, not “Alza-asn”.
I proofread in Japanese, not English.
https://tenor.com/view/its-happening-gif-23353691
Thank you Ace for the amazing opportunity!!!

Thank you Ace! I realized that the official patch notes generally list every change made in detail, which I haven't been doing in my Github pull requests. I made a more detailed list of all the changes I made for use as patch notes so that you don't have to manually compile it yourself...

```
[Main Story]
- Main title cards for Faded Legacy and Astral Reign chapters have been edited and proofread
- All stage names, stage details, and stage description flavor text for the main story chapters in Faded Legacy have been updated with human-verified translation and editing
- All of Chapter 4 story has been updated with human-verified translation and editing
- All of Chapter 5 story has been updated with human-verified translation and editing

[Fixes]
- Fixed mistranslation in the description of the "Paradox" covenant set
- Fixed mistranslation in the description of the "Dream of Medicine" covenant set
- Fixed an error in Faros' "Ocean of Elation" skill description
- Fixed a description error for "Caro Symbiosis" effect in the Chaos Realm, which was still showing the effect from a previous patch version
- Fixed a description error for Aequor Realm where the additional tentacle per turn in Surging Tides stance was not mentioned
- Fixed a description error for the Surging Tides stance in battle where the additional tentacle gained per turn was not mentioned
- Updated the description of the Raging Waves stance in battle to clarify the effects of the stance
- Fixed an error in the name of the "Memory Fragments" map event
- Updated the description for the Blade of the Titan Wheel of Destiny to clarify the effect of the wheel
- Fixed a typo in the UI where it said "Misssion" instead of "Mission"
- Fixed a typo in the UI where it said "Hidden Event" instead of "Hide Event"
- Updated the description for Helot's "Lasting Loath" skill to specify that it is considered a "Strike"
- Fixed a typo in the Gift of Decay Wheel of Destiny
- Fixed an error in the Admist the Downpour Wheel of Destiny description to clarify that it triggers poison, not inflicts
- Fixed an error in the Pale Descendant Wheel of Destiny description to clarify that it triggers poison, not inflicts
```

I will also try to be better with detailing the exact changes I make in my github updates and pull requests so you don't have to do as much work going forwards...<:auritacry:1396906080516440278> 

I'm not sure if the cutoff has already passed for the September 17th update, but I submitted a new pull request with some fixes that I missed the first time around. In case that makes it in, the notes for that should be:
```
- Fixed various instances where Koum's name was inconsistent in the text
- Fixed some minor errors and updated some wording choices in the Chapter 4/5 story text
- Fixed a typo in the UI where it said "Hidden Card" instead of "Hide Cards"
- Fixed an error in Salvador's "Creator's Blessing" exalt description
- Fixed a typo in Agrippa's "Pale Blessing" exalt description
- Fixed a typo in the in-battle Tentacle details tooltip
```
out of curiosity was my first batch of text message updates not accepted or are they not going in yet?

Hey <@1376763322568937562> I failed to catch a pretty severe error in my initial upload of Map Tile Events. I put up a pull request to fix these issues and it needs to directly patch the September 17th update before it goes live.
https://github.com/BIAVGit/Morimens-Localizations/pull/23
THANK YOU!! <:LUV:1003188300036702229> Sorry for the mistake~

**Contributor** : Noah, Goz, Basile, Loki Locstar, nauravale, Jun
